originalTitle: Bye-bye, ‘HODL’: Strategy now has a plan to sell bitcoin to raise cash and buy its stock
summary: Strategy disclosed a program to sell bitcoin “from time to time” to fund its U.S. dollar reserve and share repurchases.
content: Strategy disclosed a program to sell bitcoin “from time to time” to fund its U.S. dollar reserve and share repurchases.
chineseTitle: 再见，“HODL”：Strategy 现在计划出售比特币以筹集现金并购买其股票
chineseSummary: Strategy 披露了一项“不时”出售比特币的计划，为其美元储备和股票回购提供资金。
chineseContent: Strategy 披露了一项“不时”出售比特币的计划，为其美元储备和股票回购提供资金。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
